title: InitArray on non-array internal error when initializing parameter arrays
body:
For both parameters and localparams, this fails in Verilator 5.022:
```systemverilog
localparam int BAR = 64;
localparam int FOO [N-1:0] = '{default: BAR};
```

The error message is:
```
%Error: Internal Error: .../V3Width.cpp:2509: InitArray on non-array
```

I would say that parameter arrays are indeed arrays so this should be supported (it works in both VCS and Vivado).
